name: team
description: Planning, review, QA, shipping, and retrospective workflows

interface.shortDescription: Planning, review, QA, shipping, and retrospective workflows
interface.longDescription: A Codex workflow stack for planning, engineering review, design review, debugging, QA, shipping, and retrospectives. The plugin packages the repository's reusable process skills, commands, hooks, and agents for end-to-end software delivery.
defaultPrompt: Run an engineering review on this implementation plan
QA this feature and fix what you find
Review this branch before I ship it
